compositions.composition_note: Standard Ti-6Al-4V nominal composition; ELI grade powder used
compositions.processing_conditions: original: EOSINT M 280 SLM unit with Yb:YAG fiber laser; argon gas environment; laser power 280 W; scan speed 1200 mm/s; scan spacing 0.14 mm; layer thickness 30 um; scan rotation 90 deg; volumetric energy density 55.6 J/mm3; post-SLM stress relieving anneal at 650 degC for 3 h || simplified: SLM with t=30 um, phi=90deg, J=55.6 J/mm3; stress relieved 650 C 3h
compositions.equipment: EOSINT M 280 SLM unit with Yb:YAG fiber laser
compositions.xrd_details: XRD on B and S planes; hexagonal alpha/alpha' phases confirmed; beta phase absent; strongest (110) intensity peak in B3090 indicating relatively random lath orientation
compositions.microstructure_description: original: Fine acicular alpha/alpha' lath structure within prior beta grains; alpha phase decorated at prior beta grain boundaries; columnar grains spanning entire height in build direction; laths oriented at ~45 deg to BD due to Burger's orientation relationship; c/a ratio of alpha' = 1.589 vs alpha c/a = 1.59-1.6; epitaxial growth in <001>_beta direction || simplified: Columnar prior beta grains with fine acicular alpha/alpha' laths; alpha at grain boundaries; laths at 45 deg to BD

precipitates.phase_type: alpha phase at prior beta GBs

compositions.grain_size_text: Prior beta grain side length ~140 um in B-plane (equals scan spacing); long columnar grains in S-plane spanning entire height; lath size 5-30 um

characterisation.XRD: HCP alpha/alpha' confirmed; beta phase absent; texture analysis on B and S planes
characterisation.SEM: Backscattered electron imaging showing alternating bright/dark laths (Z contrast)
characterisation.TEM: SAED confirming alpha and alpha' phases with different c/a ratios
characterisation.EBSD: Lath size measurement with 0.3 um step size on 400x400 um areas
characterisation.OM: Porosity analysis on mirror polished surfaces at 200X

compositions.processing_conditions: original: EOSINT M 280 SLM unit with Yb:YAG fiber laser; argon gas environment; laser power 280 W; scan speed 1200 mm/s; scan spacing 0.14 mm; layer thickness 30 um; scan rotation 67 deg; volumetric energy density 55.6 J/mm3; post-SLM stress relieving anneal at 650 degC for 3 h || simplified: SLM with t=30 um, phi=67deg, J=55.6 J/mm3; stress relieved 650 C 3h

compositions.xrd_details: XRD on B and S planes; hexagonal alpha/alpha' phases confirmed; beta phase absent; Ti3Al peak absent due to high J
compositions.microstructure_description: original: Near-equiaxed prior beta grains in B-plane due to 67 deg scan rotation causing mismatch between successive laser tracks; columnar grains in S-plane with jagged discontinuous walls; fine acicular alpha/alpha' laths within prior beta grains; alpha phase at grain boundaries; melt pool boundaries do not overlap due to 67 deg rotation || simplified: Near-equiaxed prior beta in B-plane; columnar with jagged walls in S-plane; fine alpha/alpha' laths

compositions.grain_size_text: Prior beta grain diameter ~140 um in B-plane (equals scan spacing); irregular, short columnar grains in S-plane due to mismatch between laser tracks

compositions.composition_note: Standard Ti-6Al-4V nominal composition; ELI grade powder used
compositions.processing_conditions: original: EOSINT M 280 SLM unit with Yb:YAG fiber laser; argon gas environment; laser power 340 W; scan speed 1250 mm/s; scan spacing 0.12 mm; layer thickness 60 um; scan rotation 90 deg; volumetric energy density 37.8 J/mm3; post-SLM stress relieving anneal at 650 degC for 3 h || simplified: SLM with t=60 um, phi=90deg, J=37.8 J/mm3; stress relieved 650 C 3h
compositions.equipment: EOSINT M 280 SLM unit with Yb:YAG fiber laser
compositions.xrd_details: XRD on B and S planes; hexagonal alpha/alpha' phases confirmed; beta phase absent; low-intensity Ti3Al peak at 2theta=27 deg
compositions.microstructure_description: original: Square columnar prior beta grains in B-plane (side length ~120 um equals scan spacing); smaller J causes decreased melt pool size and formation of melt zone boundaries; epitaxy in BD is prevented; shortened vertical columnar grains in S-plane due to melt pool boundaries; fine acicular alpha/alpha' laths within prior beta grains || simplified: Square columnar prior beta (smaller ~120 um); epitaxy broken; shortened columnar in S-plane; alpha/alpha' laths

precipitates.phase_type: alpha phase at prior beta GBs

compositions.grain_size_text: Prior beta grain side length ~120 um in B-plane (equals reduced scan spacing); shortened vertical columnar grains in S-plane due to melt pool boundaries; epitaxy broken; lath size 5-30 um

characterisation.XRD: HCP alpha/alpha' confirmed; beta phase absent; Ti3Al peak present
characterisation.EBSD: Lath size measurement showing similar lath sizes to other samples
characterisation.OM: Porosity analysis on mirror polished surfaces

compositions.composition_note: Standard Ti-6Al-4V nominal composition; ELI grade powder used; optimal combination for strength-ductility-toughness
compositions.processing_conditions: original: EOSINT M 280 SLM unit with Yb:YAG fiber laser; argon gas environment; laser power 340 W; scan speed 1250 mm/s; scan spacing 0.12 mm; layer thickness 60 um; scan rotation 67 deg; volumetric energy density 37.8 J/mm3; post-SLM stress relieving anneal at 650 degC for 3 h || simplified: SLM with t=60 um, phi=67deg, J=37.8 J/mm3; stress relieved 650 C 3h

compositions.equipment: EOSINT M 280 SLM unit with Yb:YAG fiber laser
compositions.xrd_details: XRD on B and S planes; hexagonal alpha/alpha' phases confirmed; beta phase absent
compositions.microstructure_description: original: Equiaxed prior beta grains in B-plane (optimal mesostructure); irregular and short grain boundaries in S-plane; 67 deg rotation causes mismatch preventing epitaxy; fine acicular alpha/alpha' laths within prior beta grains; corrugated fracture surface due to equiaxed prior beta grains in S-plane; lowest porosity (0.17%) || simplified: Equiaxed prior beta in B-plane (optimal); irregular short boundaries in S-plane; lowest porosity 0.17%; corrugated fracture

precipitates.phase_type: alpha phase at prior beta GBs

compositions.grain_size_text: Equiaxed prior beta grains in B-plane (~120 um equals scan spacing); irregular and short grain boundaries in S-plane; lath size 5-30 um; optimal mesostructure

characterisation.XRD: HCP alpha/alpha' confirmed; beta phase absent
characterisation.OM: Porosity analysis; X-ray tomography for 3D porosity analysis

properties_of_composition.measurement_condition: at 298.15 K; strain rate 0.001 /s; displacement control 0.006 mm/s
properties_of_composition.test_specimen: ASTM E8; dog-bone 6 mm gage length; 2x0.5 mm cross-section
properties_of_composition.note: High yield strength combined with highest ductility (12.8%); marginal anisotropy

properties_of_composition.measurement_condition: at 298.15 K; strain rate 0.001 /s
properties_of_composition.test_specimen: ASTM E8; dog-bone 6 mm gage length; 2x0.5 mm cross-section
properties_of_composition.note: Perpendicular to build direction
properties_of_composition.additional_information: Direction: perpendicular to build direction (S); work hardening ~74 MPa (7% of sigma_Y)

properties_of_composition.measurement_condition: at 298.15 K; strain rate 0.001 /s
properties_of_composition.test_specimen: ASTM E8; dog-bone 6 mm gage length; 2x0.5 mm cross-section
properties_of_composition.note: Highest ductility among all combinations; comparable to alpha+beta microstructure; corrugated fracture surface

properties_of_composition.measurement_condition: at 298.15 K; plane strain conditions confirmed; displacement rate 0.01 mm/s
properties_of_composition.test_specimen: ASTM E399-12; Chevron notch C(T) specimen; 12 mm thick, 24 mm wide; a/W ~0.45-0.55
properties_of_composition.note: Highest K_Ic; no anisotropy with B6067; comparable to conventionally manufactured Ti64

properties_of_composition.measurement_condition: at 298.15 K; load shedding method per ASTM E647-15; R=0.1; 10 Hz sinusoidal; da/dN threshold 2e-9 m/cycle
properties_of_composition.test_specimen: ASTM E647-15; precracked C(T) specimen; a/W ~0.45-0.55
properties_of_composition.note: Relatively insensitive to mesostructure

properties_of_composition.measurement_condition: at 298.15 K; da/dN = C(DeltaK)^m; R=0.1; 10 Hz sinusoidal
properties_of_composition.test_specimen: ASTM E647-15; C(T) specimen
properties_of_composition.note: Near-identical to B6067; FCG behavior isotropic due to equiaxed mesostructure
